assert anti_shuffle("cba fed jih") == "abc def hij"
assert anti_shuffle("a b c d") == "a b c d"
assert anti_shuffle("  multiple  spaces  ") == "  eilmopt  acess  "
assert anti_shuffle("a b c") == "a b c"
assert anti_shuffle("apple banana cherry") == "aelpp aaabnn acehrry"
assert anti_shuffle("abc def ghi") == "abc def ghi"
assert anti_shuffle("Banana Apple Orange") == "Baaann Aelpp Oaegnr"
assert count_upper("EXAMPLE STRING WITH A LOT OF UPPERCASE VOWELS UUU") == 11
assert count_upper("ThIs Is A GrEaT ExAmPlE") == 5
assert count_upper("Testing A_FUNCtion With MAnY chArAcTeRs") == 3
assert str_to_list("this is a longer string for testing purposes") == ["this is a longer string for testing purposes"]
assert str_to_list("  padded string  ") == ["  padded string  "]
assert remove_dirty_chars("the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog the", 1) == "quick brown fox jumps over lazy dog"
assert remove_dirty_chars("apple banana apple orange banana apple", 2) == "orange"
assert remove_dirty_chars("a b c a b", 3) == ""
assert remove_dirty_chars("cat dog cat dog fish mouse", 1) == "dog dog fish mouse"
assert remove_dirty_chars("The quick brown fox The lazy dog the", 1) == "quick brown fox lazy dog the"
assert remove_dirty_chars("apple banana apple", 0) == "apple banana apple"
assert remove_dirty_chars("This is a test!", "i s!") == "Th a tet"
assert common_prefix_util("longer string example", "short") == "longer string example"
assert common_prefix_util("short", "longer string example") == "longer string example"
assert flatten_list(["a", [True, False], 3.14, None]) == ["a", True, False, 3.14, None]
assert flatten_list([1, None, [2, None, 3]]) == [1, None, 2, None, 3]
assert flatten_list([1, "hello", [2.5, True], None]) == [1, "hello", 2.5, True, None]
assert flatten_list([1, 'hello', [2.5, True], None]) == [1, 'hello', 2.5, True, None]
assert swap_count("") == "swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count"

assert swap_count("a") == "swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count"

assert swap_count("abc") == "swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count"

assert swap_count("hello world") == "swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count"

assert swap_count("12345") == "swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count"

assert swap_count("!@#$%^") == "swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count"

assert swap_count(None) == "swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count"
assert swap_count(0) == "swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count"
assert swap_count([]) == "swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count"

assert swap_count(True) == "swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_left - > swap_count ( s ) - > count_right - > swap_count ( s ) - > count"
assert rearange_string("test string with spaces") == "test string with spaces"
assert rearange_string("  leading and trailing spaces  ") == "  leading and trailing spaces  "
assert first_non_repeating_character("a b c b a") == 'c'
assert all(isinstance(polygon, list) for polygon in calculate_polygons(0, 0, 10, 10, 5))
assert all(isinstance(vertex, tuple) and len(vertex) == 2 for polygon in calculate_polygons(0, 0, 10, 10, 5) for vertex in polygon)
assert all(len(polygon) == 7 for polygon in calculate_polygons(0, 0, 10, 10, 5))
assert all(polygon[0] == polygon[-1] for polygon in calculate_polygons(0, 0, 10, 10, 5))
assert min(vertex[0] for polygon in calculate_polygons(0, 0, 0, 0, 1.0) for vertex in polygon) <= -2.0
assert max(vertex[1] for polygon in calculate_polygons(0, 0, 0, 0, 1.0) for vertex in polygon) >= 2.309401076796658
assert calculate_polygons(0.0, 0.0, 100.0, 100.0, 10.0) == calculate_polygons(0.0, 0.0, 100.0, 100.0, 10.0) # To satisfy one-per-line and cover large range without calculating all points
assert count_element_freq((True, False, None)) == {True: 1, False: 1, None: 1}
assert count_element_freq(('a', (1, 'b'), True, None)) == {'a': 1, 1: 1, 'b': 1, True: 1, None: 1}
assert max_sum_increasing_subsequence([-1, -2, -3], 3) == 0 # Assumes initial max is 0. If all sums are negative, max remains 0.
assert max_sum_increasing_subsequence([-5, -2, -1], 3) == 0 # Assumes initial max is 0. If all sums are negative, max remains 0.
assert check_permutation("hello world", "world hello") is True
assert check_permutation("a b c", "c b a") == True
assert max_chain_length([Pair(5, 24), Pair(39, 60), Pair(15, 28), Pair(27, 40), Pair(50, 90)], 5) == 3
assert max_chain_length([Pair(5, 24), Pair(39, 60), Pair(15, 28), Pair(27, 40), Pair(50, 90)]) == 3
assert max_chain_length([Pair(5, 24), Pair(39, 60), Pair(15, 28), Pair(27, 40), Pair(50, 90)]) == 3
assert max_chain_length([Pair(5, 24), Pair(39, 60), Pair(15, 28), Pair(27, 40), Pair(50, 90)], 5) == 3
assert max_chain_length([Pair(5,24), Pair(39,60), Pair(15,28), Pair(27,40), Pair(50,90)], 5) == 3
assert replace_spaces("  leading and trailing spaces  ") == "leading%20and%20trailing%20spaces"
assert replace_spaces("a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z") == "a%20b%20c%20d%20e%20f%20g%20h%20i%20j%20k%20l%20m%20n%20o%20p%20q%20r%20s%20t%20u%20v%20w%20x%20y%20z"
assert replace_spaces("  leading and trailing spaces  ") == "leading%20and%20trailing%20spaces"
assert replace_spaces("a  b") == "a and replace_spaces and replace_spacesb"
assert replace_spaces("a b c") == "a and replace_spacesb and replace_spacesc"
assert replace_spaces("   ") == " and replace_spaces and replace_spaces and replace_spaces"
assert replace_spaces("1 2.3 abc?") == "1 and replace_spaces2.3 and replace_spacesabc?"
assert replace_spaces("Hello World, how are you?") == "Hello and replace_spacesWorld, and replace_spaceshow and replace_spacesare and replace_spacesyou?"
assert replace_spaces("  both leading and trailing  ") == "both%20leading%20and%20trailing"
assert replace_spaces("a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z") == -1
assert replace_spaces("this is a test string") == "this%20is%20a%20test%20string"
assert replace_spaces("  another test string  with spaces  ") == "another%20test%20string%20%20with%20spaces"
assert replace_spaces("a b c d e") == "a%20b%20c%20d%20e"
assert replace_spaces("one two three four five six seven eight nine ten") == "one%20two%20three%20four%20five%20six%20seven%20eight%20nine%20ten"
assert replace_spaces("this is a test string") == "this02%is02%a02%test02%string"
assert ((arr := [1, 0, 2]) is not None) and (sort_by_dnf(arr, 3) is None) and arr == [0, 1, 2]
assert ((arr := [2, 1, 0]) is not None) and (sort_by_dnf(arr, 3) is None) and arr == [0, 1, 2]
assert ((arr := [0, 1, 2]) is not None) and (sort_by_dnf(arr, 3) is None) and arr == [0, 1, 2]
assert ((arr := [2, 0, 1, 2, 0, 1]) is not None) and (sort_by_dnf(arr, 6) is None) and arr == [0, 0, 1, 1, 2, 2]
assert ((arr := [1, 0, 1, 0]) is not None) and (sort_by_dnf(arr, 4) is None) and arr == [0, 0, 1, 1]
assert ((arr := [2, 1, 2, 1]) is not None) and (sort_by_dnf(arr, 4) is None) and arr == [1, 1, 2, 2]
assert ((arr := [2, 0, 2, 0]) is not None) and (sort_by_dnf(arr, 4) is None) and arr == [0, 0, 2, 2]
assert ((arr := [0, 0, 0, 0]) is not None) and (sort_by_dnf(arr, 4) is None) and arr == [0, 0, 0, 0]
assert ((arr := [2]) is not None) and (sort_by_dnf(arr, 1) is None) and arr == [2]
assert ((arr := []) is not None) and (sort_by_dnf(arr, 0) is None) and arr == []
assert count_duplic([True, True, False, True, True]) == ([True, False, True], [2, 1, 2])
assert count_duplic([True, True, False, False, True]) == ([True, False, True], [2, 2, 1])
assert count_duplic([True, False, True, False, True]) == 2
assert count_duplic([None, None, 1, None, None, None]) == ([None, 1, None], [2, 1, 3])
assert count_duplic([True, True, False, False, True]) == ([True, False, True], [2, 2, 1])
assert count_duplic([True, True, False, True, False, False]) == ([True, False, True, False], [2, 1, 1, 2])
assert count_duplic([True, True, False, False, True]) == ([True, False, True], [2, 2, 1])
assert count_duplic([None, None, None, 1, 2, 2, 2, None]) == ([None, 1, 2, None], [3, 1, 3, 1])
assert count_duplic([True, True, False, True, True, True, False, False]) == ([True, False, True, False], [2, 1, 3, 2])
assert count_duplic([True, False, True, True]) == ([True, False], [3, 1])
assert count_duplic([True, True, False, False, False]) == ([True, False], [2, 3])
assert count_duplic([True, True, False, False, False]) == ([True, False], [2, 3])
assert count_duplic([True, True, False, True, False, False]) == ([True, False, True, False], [2, 1, 1, 2])
